channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: The dirty little secret of open source contributions
item.description: “Nobody cares if you contribute.” That’s what a Postgres friend said to me during lunch at KubeCon when I suggested that hiring Postgres contributors could be a selling point for customers.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: After iPhone and iMac, Apple may be courting Foxconn to build AI servers based on its M-series CPU to accelerate Apple Intelligence potential
item.description: Apple "courting" Foxconn to build AI servers based on its M-series CPU to accelerate Apple Intelligence potential.
item.dc:creator: waynewilliams@onmail.com (Wayne Williams), TechRadar

item.title: New Chinese humanoid robot shows off its strength by lifting 35 pounds per hand
item.description: China's Shanghai Kepler Robotics has developed a new humanoid robot that can carry up to 35 pounds per hand for commercial applications across various industries
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The Onion CEO explains Infowars purchase amid Alex Jones's claims about auction
item.description: The Onion CEO Ben Collins confirmed that the publication purchased Alex Jones’s Infowars outlet in a Saturday series of posts on the social media platform Bluesky amid Jones's claims of wrongdoing and illegal activity.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, The Hill

item.title: EU fines Meta over $840 million for ‘abusive practices’ favoring Facebook Marketplace
item.description: Meta received a fine of over $840 million on Wednesday for breaching the European Union’s antitrust rules as it relates to market domination after three years of legal proceedings.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, The Hill

item.title: Apple’s AirPods Pro 2 makes hearing tests as easy as a few taps
item.description: Checking your hearing has gotten easier with the new hearing test feature in AirPods Pro 2. You can take reliable hearing tests using your iPhone or iPad.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How to make your VPN faster
item.description: Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson explains how a VPN — virtual private network — works and how running it can slow down the operation of your device.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Democratic senators call for federal probe into Musk's contact with Russia
item.description: A pair of Democratic senators called for a federal investigation into Elon Musk’s involvement in SpaceX’s federal contracts following reports the tech billionaire has been in regular contact with Russian President Vladimir Putin.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: For truly intelligent AI, we need to mimic the brain’s sensorimotor principles
item.description: In a recent essay by Sam Altman, titled “The Intelligence Age,” he paints a picture for the future of AI. He states that with AI, “fixing the climate, establishing a space colony, and the discovery of all of physics—will eventually become commonplace.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Hawkins, Fast Company

item.title: China hacked U.S. telecommunications networks, FBI and CISA say
item.description: A federal investigation into Chinese government efforts to hack into U.S. telecommunications networks has revealed a “broad and significant” cyberespionage campaign aimed at stealing information from Americans who work in government and politics, the FBI said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Bluesky goes down as users continue to flee Elon Musk’s X for the Twitter-like alternative
item.description: Bluesky, the popular X alternative, appeared to be down or lagging for thousands of users on Thursday morning, according to outage-tracking website Downdetector. More than 2,000 users reported issues with the site just before 9 a.m. PST.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: Polymarket at center of political storm after reported FBI raid
item.description: Prediction betting market Polymarket and its founder and CEO Shayne Coplan have found themselves at the center of a debate about political betting after the FBI reportedly raided Coplan’s home on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Cisco amps up Splunk observability platform
item.description: As promised, Cisco is making changes to its observability product portfolio to help customers better manage applications across on-premises, hybrid, and multi-cloud environments.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Apple’s iPhone partners make plans for US manufacturing
item.description: In a sign of the times, Apple’s key manufacturing partners are ready to ramp up production in the US should the incoming Trump administration keep its promise to levy painful surcharges on Chinese imports.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Homeland Security Department releases framework for using AI in critical infrastructure
item.description: The Biden administration has released guidelines for using artificial intelligence in the power grid, water system, air travel network and other pieces of critical infrastructure.
item.dc:creator: Josh Boak, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Only 8 monkeys remain free after more than a week outside a South Carolina compound
item.description: Authorities say Just eight monkeys remain free from the group who broke out of a South Carolina compound that breeds the primates for medical research.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: In Cyprus, Ukrainians learn how to dispose of landmines that kill and maim hundreds
item.description: NICOSIA, Cyprus (AP) — In a Cypriot National Guard camp, Ukrainians are being trained on how to identify, locate and dispose of landmines and other unexploded munitions that litter huge swaths of their country, killing and maiming hundreds of people, including children.
item.dc:creator: MENELAOS HADJICOSTIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: One Tech Tip: Replacing passwords with passkeys for an easier login experience
item.description: LONDON (AP) — If you're tired of memorizing passwords, then give passkeys a try. You might have noticed that many online services are now offering the option of using passkeys, a digital authentication method touted as an easier and more secure way to log in.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Understanding Hyperlight, Microsoft’s minimal VM manager
item.description: Virtualization seemed to be one of those technologies that was done. With Hyper-V, VMware, and KVM all offering similar features and performance, all that was left to do was to support new chipset instructions and fix bugs.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Supreme Court weighs Nvidia challenge to securities fraud claims
item.description: The Supreme Court on Wednesday weighed a bid from chipmaker Nvidia as it attempts to avoid a suit alleging its executives misled investors about the extent its sales depended on volatile cryptocurrency miners.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: VMware makes Workstation and Fusion free for everyone
item.description: VMware this week announced that the virtualization company’s hypervisor products, VMware Workstation and Fusion, will be completely free for both personal and commercial users, as well as for educational purposes.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Visual Studio 17.12 brings C++, Copilot enhancements
item.description: Visual Studio 2022 17.12, the latest version of Microsoft’s signature integrated development environment (IDE), is now generally available, with improvements ranging from productivity enhancements for C++ developers to integrated AI variable inspection in the GitHub Copilot AI-powered programming as
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Chinese hackers target Tibetan websites in malware attack, cybersecurity group says
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — A hacking group that is believed to be Chinese state-sponsored has compromised two websites with ties to the Tibetan community in an attack meant to install malware on users' computers, according to findings released Wednesday by a private cybersecurity firm.
item.dc:creator: DAVID RISING, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Bitcoin neared $90,000 in a new record high. What to know about crypto's post-election rally
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — As money continues to pour into crypto following Donald Trump's reelection last week, bitcoin has climbed to yet another record high. The world's largest cryptocurrency topped $89,000 for the first time, briefly peaking at $89,995 early Tuesday, according to CoinDesk.
item.dc:creator: WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Microsoft’s .NET 9 arrives, with performance, cloud, and AI boosts
item.description: Microsoft has announced the general availability of .NET 9, a major upgrade of its open source software development platform that features scads of performance enhancements and new capabilities for building cloud-native and generative AI-enabled applications. Released November 12, .
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Japan's SoftBank returns to profit after gains at Vision Fund and other investments
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — Japanese technology group SoftBank swung back to profitability in the July-September quarter, boosted by positive results in its Vision Fund investments. Tokyo-based SoftBank Group Corp.
item.dc:creator: YURI KAGEYAMA, Associated Press, KREX 5
